hero.title: Study in Canada Through the Francophone Minority Communities Student Pilot
hero.body: A dedicated pathway for eligible French-speaking students to study at participating French-language institutions outside Quebec.

student.title: FMC Student Pilot
student.desc: For students who want to study in Canada. No job offer required.

worker.title: Francophone Mobility Work Permit
worker.desc: For skilled workers who already have a Canadian job offer. No study permit required.

eligibility.title: Eligibility
eligibility.subtitle: You may qualify if you meet all of the following.

points.title: Francophone country of origin
points.description: A citizen or resident of an eligible francophone country.

points.title: Accepted at a participating institution
points.description: An admission letter from a participating institution outside Quebec.

points.title: French-language program
points.description: Your program of study is delivered primarily in French.

points.title: Standard IRCC requirements
points.description: Standard study permit requirements: proof of finances, health, and character.

items.title: Priority processing
items.desc: Applications through this pilot are processed faster than standard study permits.

items.title: French-speaking environment
items.desc: Study and live in a dedicated French-language community outside Quebec.

items.title: Study outside Quebec
items.desc: Access world-class French-language education in Ontario, New Brunswick, Manitoba, and other provinces.

items.title: Pathway to permanent residence
items.desc: Graduating outside Quebec strengthens your Express Entry profile.

process.title: How Masomo Now Helps
process.subtitle: From checking your eligibility to arriving on campus.

steps.title: Eligibility Assessment
steps.desc: We check your background against the FMC pilot requirements.

steps.title: Program Selection
steps.desc: We find the right French-language program for your goals.

steps.title: Application Preparation
steps.desc: We prepare your full application package.

steps.title: Study Permit Guidance
steps.desc: We guide you through the IRCC study permit application.

steps.title: Pre-Departure & Arrival Support
steps.desc: We prepare you for life in Canada.

cta.title: Ready to Study in Canada?
cta.body: Book a free consultation and we'll assess your eligibility and guide you through every step of the application process.
